title: Eternal Winter Mirage
description: Eternal Winter Mirage, a simple dimensional mod
body:
This is a simple dimensional mod that consolidates all the cold biological communities in the main world into one dimension.The inspiration for this mod comes from the server player's need for a cold dimension. Originally intended for my own server, it was released as an independent mod commissioned by other players

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b61d6c05cbbc712421e21dcdb8942a0e8cd3545.png)
The snow block serves as the framework for the portal, and the Albefaction Diamond is used to activate the portal
![Albefaction Diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b1a318be2f210f3f4bc883c0d173806302533a1.png)

这是原本用于我个人服务器的模组，受其他玩家委托单独作为模组发布
本模组非常简单，就单纯把主世界冷的生物群系塞在一个维度里，上图的合成表是用于激活传送门的框架，传送门的形式和地狱门相同，不过将黑曜石换成了雪块
